candidate_llm_application: LLM output canonical-form enforcement: a meta-classifier audits generations against a learned canon of permissible outputs; deviations trigger regeneration. Hierarchy of canons per task.

results.title: Output-Format Constrained Decoding: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on output-format constrained decoding, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
results.judge_justification: Both candidate and result operate on the same LLM artefact (output-format constrained decoding); functional outcome matches even though vocabulary differs (iconography terms vs LLM terms).

results.title: Output-Format Constrained Decoding: Method

results.judge_justification: Partial overlap: same artefact but mechanism diverges; result is tangential to candidate's claim.
